SigmaQueries.MainContractorsSql: SELECT * FROM maincontractor WHERE code > 0 AND [state] = 1
SigmaQueries.MainContractorByCodeSql: SELECT * FROM maincontractor WHERE code = @code AND code > 0 AND [state] = 1
SigmaQueries.MainContractorDetListSql: SELECT * FROM maincontractordet_view WHERE [state] = 1 AND code = @code
SigmaQueries.MainContractorDetDetailSql: SELECT * FROM maincontractordet_view WHERE [state] = 1 AND code = @code AND s_code = @sCode
SigmaQueries.EmployeesListSql: SELECT * FROM employee WHERE [state] = 1 AND code > 0 AND acceseAPK1 = 0
SigmaQueries.EmployeeByCodeSql: SELECT * FROM employee WHERE [state] = 1 AND code > 0 AND acceseAPK1 = 0 AND code = @code
SigmaQueries.EmployeePermissionSql: SELECT TOP (1) 1 FROM employeeuserper WHERE [state] = 1 AND code = @code AND s_code = @sCode
SigmaQueries.EmployeePasswordSql: SELECT TOP (1) 1 FROM employee WHERE code = @code AND pass = @pass
SigmaQueries.TypeWorksSql: SELECT * FROM typework WHERE [state] = 1 AND code > 0
SigmaQueries.BandsSql: SELECT * FROM band WHERE [state] = 1 AND code > 0
